reviews.comment:
Esmerada, amable y predispuesta atención en el renovado SERVICOMPRAS! Variedad de comidas Regionales y  muy bueno el café. Precios accesibles y todos los medios de pago. Cargan puntos Serviclub! Excelente!

(Translated by Google)
Attentive, friendly, and helpful service at the newly renovated SERVICOMPRAS! A variety of regional dishes and very good coffee. Affordable prices and all forms of payment accepted. They even accept Serviclub points! Excellent!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZa08tV09BEAE
